scaffold.noOperation: No mutation operation for this workload yet.

users.title: Identities
operations: Look up a user by ID or UPN
Assign or remove licenses and roles

mutate.title: Randomize an attribute
mutate.description: Picks one attribute at random (from the set {{attributes}}) and overwrites it with a random value on every identity listed above (when Identities is enabled). Manager and Sponsors are excluded because they reference other directory objects rather than plain values.

mail.title: Mail
operations: Send a new mail message as a mailbox

mutate.title: Randomize mailbox activity
mutate.description: For each selected mailbox, performs one random action: send a new message ({{send}}%), reply to an inbox message (35%), forward one to another selected user (30%){{deletions}}. Random subject and body text come from OpenRouter when a key is configured, otherwise a GUID.
mutate.deletionsClause: , or move one to Deleted Items (5%)

calendar.title: Calendar
operations: Create a calendar event with attendees

mutate.title: Randomize calendar activity
mutate.description: For each selected mailbox, performs one random action: create a meeting request inviting another selected user (50%) or create a single-user appointment (50%). Each is a 30-minute event on a weekday within the sender's working hours, with a random subject from OpenRouter when a key is configured, otherwise a GUID.

files.title: Files
operations: Upload a document to a user's OneDrive
Upload a document to a SharePoint site library
Remove a document from OneDrive or SharePoint
